questions.question: Tell me about a time you launched a product from zero to one.
questions.starStory: At Stripe, I led the launch of the Connect Express onboarding flow, taking it from concept to GA in 4 months with 2K merchants onboarded in the first quarter.

questions.question: How do you prioritize when you have competing stakeholder demands?
questions.starStory: At Airbnb, I managed competing requests from growth and trust teams by building a shared scoring framework that weighted user impact, revenue, and regulatory risk.

questions.question: Describe a technical decision you made that had significant business impact.
questions.starStory: I chose to rebuild the API rate limiter at Stripe from a fixed-window to a sliding-window design, reducing false-positive blocks by 60% and unlocking $2M in previously throttled transactions.

questions.question: How do you work with engineering teams on technical trade-offs?
questions.starStory: At Airbnb, I facilitated a build-vs-buy decision for our experimentation platform by creating a decision matrix with eng leads and presenting data to VP Eng.

questions.question: What metrics would you use to measure success for this product?
questions.starStory: For the payments platform at Stripe, I established a metrics hierarchy: API uptime (99.99%), developer activation (time-to-first-call), and monthly active integrations.

research: Review Acme's recent product launches and blog posts
Understand their competitive positioning vs. alternatives
Research the hiring manager's background and past companies
